# Action Verbs for Resume Bullet Points
# resume-ats-agent resource
# One verb per line. Lines starting with # are comments.
# Grouped by category for human readability; all loaded as a flat set by scripts.

# ── Leadership & Management ──────────────────────────────────────
Chaired
Coached
Coordinated
Cultivated
Delegated
Directed
Drove
Facilitated
Founded
Governed
Guided
Headed
Influenced
Inspired
Led
Managed
Mentored
Mobilized
Motivated
Navigated
Orchestrated
Oversaw
Pioneered
Recruited
Spearheaded
Supervised
United

# ── Building & Engineering ────────────────────────────────────────
Architected
Assembled
Built
Coded
Configured
Constructed
Crafted
Designed
Developed
Engineered
Established
Fabricated
Formulated
Implemented
Integrated
Launched
Modeled
Programmed
Prototyped
Rebuilt
Refactored
Revamped
Structured
Wrote

# ── Optimization & Improvement ────────────────────────────────────
Accelerated
Automated
Consolidated
Cut
Decreased
Eliminated
Enhanced
Improved
Maximized
Minimized
Optimized
Overhauled
Reduced
Refined
Renegotiated
Renovated
Replaced
Resolved
Simplified
Standardized
Streamlined
Strengthened
Trimmed
Unified
Upgraded

# ── Delivery & Execution ──────────────────────────────────────────
Achieved
Completed
Delivered
Deployed
Executed
Finalized
Fulfilled
Graduated
Met
Produced
Released
Shipped
Solved

# ── Analysis & Research ───────────────────────────────────────────
Analyzed
Assessed
Audited
Benchmarked
Calculated
Classified
Compared
Computed
Diagnosed
Evaluated
Examined
Extrapolated
Forecasted
Identified
Investigated
Mapped
Measured
Modeled
Monitored
Profiled
Researched
Reviewed
Scoped
Tested
Tracked
Validated

# ── Collaboration & Communication ────────────────────────────────
Advised
Advocated
Authored
Briefed
Collaborated
Consulted
Contributed
Conveyed
Defined
Documented
Drafted
Educated
Evangelized
Interfaced
Liaised
Negotiated
Partnered
Presented
Proposed
Published
Recommended
Reported
Translated
Wrote

# ── Scaling & Growth ──────────────────────────────────────────────
Broadened
Doubled
Expanded
Extended
Grew
Increased
Raised
Scaled
Tripled

# ── Security & Compliance ─────────────────────────────────────────
Audited
Enforced
Hardened
Mitigated
Patched
Remediated
Secured
